# AN Dev Studio

> A local-first AI app builder by AN Group. Six AI agents plan, scaffold, implement, review, fix, and deploy
> real software projects from a one-line prompt. Every file write and shell command is gated behind human
> approval before it ever touches disk or executes. Runs on the user's own machine; code never has to leave
> it when using the local ANu (Ollama) provider.

## Facts

- Product: AN Dev Studio, made by AN Group.
- Category: local-first AI app builder / AI software engineering platform.
- Pricing: Free ($0/mo, 3 projects, local ANu provider only, 2-iteration verify loop) and Pro ($19/mo globally,
  ₹999/mo in India, unlimited projects, full AI provider fallback chain, 5-iteration verify-and-fix loop with
  auto-approve).
- Licensing: one-time Lemon Squeezy hosted checkout issues a license key; no in-app card handling, no hosted
  user accounts.
- Architecture: six agents (Planner, Scaffolder, Implementer, Reviewer, Fixer, Deployer) share one project
  manifest. Every proposed file write/shell command sits in an approval queue until a human approves it.
  Approved shell commands run in a Docker sandbox scoped to the project folder.
- Supported platforms: Web, Windows (via Tauri), Android (needs Android SDK), iOS/macOS (source only, building
  requires Xcode on a Mac).
- Privacy: local ANu provider keeps everything offline; cloud providers (Groq, Cerebras, Mistral, Cloudflare,
  OpenRouter, Gemini, HuggingFace) are opt-in per the user's own provider choice.

## Pages

- [Pricing](/pricing): plans, pricing, and the privacy pitch.
- [Features](/features): the six-agent pipeline and how the build-verify-fix loop works.
- [FAQ](/faq): frequently asked questions with direct answers.
- [Terms](/terms): terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): privacy policy.
